name: Mercer Park Brand Acquisition Corp. A RV
reasoning: Mercer Park Brand Acquisition Corp. was a SPAC (Special Purpose Acquisition Company) that merged with Glass House Brands in 2021 to create a cannabis brand-building platform. SPACs are blank-check companies that raise capital through IPOs to acquire existing businesses — they do not employ options strategies. The entity was a corporate shell, not a fund or trading vehicle.
